{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Significance
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Significance]] is a primary factor in whether an object can be [[Awakened]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
